description_long: This convenience store is a compact, urban commercial building with a distinctive oversized ramen bowl and chopsticks sculpture on its roof, suggesting a specialty in Japanese cuisine. The facade features a prominent purple and white sign with Japanese characters, a glass entrance, and a small awning above the door. The exterior is a mix of light beige and pinkish tones, with some weathering and stains visible on the walls and pavement. There are utility poles with wires and signage, as well as vending machines and a small bench near the entrance, enhancing the street-level detail. The building has a flat roof with some mechanical units and a secondary structure, and the surrounding pavement is marked with cracks and patches. The overall design is functional yet playful, blending typical convenience store elements with unique decorative features.
description: A small urban convenience store with a giant ramen bowl sculpture on the roof, colorful signage, and street-level details like vending machines and utility poles.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large ramen bowl sculpture, storefront signage, vending machines, and utility pole with signage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the ramen bowl on the roof, utility pole with wires, vending machines, and a secondary rooftop structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back wall, rooftop bowl, and minimal architectural features with some weathering.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side wall, rooftop bowl, utility pole, and the edge of the awning and entrance area.
attribute_storefront_signage: Large horizontal sign above the entrance with Japanese text in white on a purple background, mounted on the facade; additional vertical sign on a pole with similar color scheme and iconography.
attribute_glass_entrance_doors: Single glass entrance door, swinging style, with a metal frame and visible handle; moderate transparency.
attribute_display_windows: One medium-sized display window adjacent to the entrance, framed in metal, transparent, with no visible advertisements.
attribute_architectural_style: contemporary urban vernacular with playful thematic elements
